scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy && pnpm run db:migrations:apply
scripts.deploy:configured: pnpm run build && pnpm run db:migrations:apply:configured && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.generated.jsonc
scripts.db:migrations:apply:configured: pnpm run wrangler:config && wrangler d1 migrations apply CFBLOG_DB --remote --config wrangler.generated.jsonc --yes
scripts.db:migrations:list:configured: pnpm run wrangler:config && wrangler d1 migrations list CFBLOG_DB --remote --config wrangler.generated.jsonc

CFBLOG_DB.description: Canonical D1 database for posts, categories, menus, media metadata, redirects, settings, revisions, and schema versions. Default deploys use wrangler.jsonc; advanced configured deploys can override with CFBLOG_D1_DATABASE_NAME and CFBLOG_D1_DATABASE_ID.

CFBLOG_MEDIA.description: R2 bucket for uploaded images and attachments. Default deploys use wrangler.jsonc; advanced configured deploys can override with CFBLOG_R2_BUCKET_NAME.

CFBLOG_CACHE.description: Optional low-risk cache namespace for advanced configured deploys. Canonical content must stay in D1 and R2. Set CFBLOG_KV_NAMESPACE_ID to bind KV in wrangler.generated.jsonc; omit it to deploy without KV.

SITE_URL.description: Deployed site origin for canonical URLs, feeds, sitemap output, and admin mutation checks. Edit vars.SITE_URL after deploy, or override with CFBLOG_SITE_URL in advanced configured deploys.

ENVIRONMENT.description: Runtime environment label. Edit vars.ENVIRONMENT in wrangler.jsonc, or override with CFBLOG_ENVIRONMENT in advanced configured deploys.

CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN.description: Cloudflare Access team domain for admin authentication, for example `https://your-team.cloudflareaccess.com`.

CF_ACCESS_AUD.description: Cloudflare Access application audience tag for the admin Access application.
